description:
🕒 09:30–14:40

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Eco-tourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/tanetsuti-1-2/

RESOURCE UPDATE: The tour originally scheduled for June 21 (Sun.) has been rescheduled to June 28 (Sun.) due to organizer circumstances.

Learn hands-on gardening using fallen leaves and branches to build "kinoko-chan" (fungal farming) beds, then plant summer vegetables. Our advisor will share easy-to-understand tips on seedling planting techniques and care methods specific to kinoko-chan farming. Lunch is served at Restaurant La Nora, where you'll enjoy Italian dishes made with kinoko-chan vegetables.

【Fee】Adults ¥8,800 | Middle school and younger ¥2,200 (includes guide, lunch, materials, insurance)

【Capacity】15 people

【Guide】Hanno Tane to Tsuchi Farm staff

【What to bring】Drinking water, hat, towel, gloves, etc.
location: 集合 ラ・ノーラ前の畑 （飯能市下加治243-25、イーグルバス「飯能靖和病院」下車徒歩8分）
summary: Experience kinoko-chan (fungal farming) garden creation and summer vegetable planting in Hanno's forest setting
